title: Barebones visible knockback swords
description: A way to make a difference between your swords depending on the level of the knockback enchantment, based on the 1.21.5 feature, for dual wielders.
body:
Based on Bare Bones resource pack, changes the textures of diamond and netherite sword to add some red to knockback 1 sword's guard and some green to knockback 2 sword's guard. Detailed images using Bare Bones and Barebones visible knockback swords available in gallery.

Designed for gank PvP in servers such as EarthMC, or dual wielding.
